/usr/bin/ar qc libdl7.a  CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7p_sizeof.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_terminate.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_init.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_update.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_free.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7p_set_database.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_setup.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_push_setup.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_push_update.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_push_free.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_dev_update.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_dev_setup.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_dev_free.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_reduction.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7_broadcast.c.o CMakeFiles/dl7.dir/l7p_mpi_type.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdl7.a
